description_long: This is a round, single-tier chocolate cake with a glossy ganache coating and red dot decorations around the top edge. The cake is topped with two colorful, cartoonish character figurines: one with a large hat and guitar, and another with pink hair and a toy gun, both standing on the cake. There is also a small, rectangular edible image or plaque featuring a group photo, placed between the figurines. The cake sits on a black pedestal cake stand, elevating it above the surface. The overall appearance is playful and themed, likely inspired by animated or video game characters.
description: A round chocolate cake with glossy ganache, topped with two cartoon character figurines and a photo plaque, displayed on a black cake stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing both character figurines, the edible photo plaque, and the full decorative top of the cake.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the pink-haired figurine and the star on their vest, with the cake's glossy surface visible.
description_view_2: Angled rear view showing both figurines from behind and the placement of the photo plaque between them.
description_view_3: Side-rear view focusing on the back of the hat-wearing figurine and the side of the cake.
